title: Guest Access for same domain
excerpt: Hiya,  so my team is using Monday but it’s not used by the whole company, so anyone outside of my team is essentially a guest even though we all have the same domain email id.  I would like to be able to share some of th…

posts.author: z_kolbeck (Zeina)
posts.cookedHtml: Hiya, so my team is using Monday but it’s not used by the whole company, so anyone outside of my team is essentially a guest even though we all have the same domain email id. I would like to be able to share some of the boards with people outside of my team, but if I add them as a team on Monday then they will have access to all of our boards which I don’t want. Any suggestions?

posts.author: Maren (Maren Byerlee)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get an answer to this? I have the same issue.

posts.author: z_kolbeck (Zeina)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Maren, nope What I’ve done instead is to give my guests access using their personal email ID so they sign up with that email id, and then it’s possible for them to update their profile and change to their work email id afterwards.
